name: Cannock East & North

links.title: Cannock North and East Neighbourhood Newsletter

description:
A popular residential area, with plenty of amenities, Chadsmoor is home to Pye Green Stadium running track, Cannock Leisure Centre and Cannock Park.

The area's two major high schools are also situated in this district, along with the municipal golf course. Cannock Hospital and Cannock Chase District Council offices are also sited in Chadsmoor.
